items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Real-time availability sync to ClassPass', but there is no direct evidence provided that confirms this requirement has been satisfied. The linked use case outlines the need for real-time availability sync, yet the prior steps do not include any evidence of this functionality being tested or validated. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion regarding this requirement.
